name: Cyberpunk
description: Futuristic neon colors with a tech dystopia aesthetic.

preview.sampleText: Neon-lit interfaces from a digital dystopia.

classes.h1: text-4xl font-black mb-4 text-cyan-400 uppercase tracking-widest
classes.h2: text-3xl font-bold mb-4 text-pink-500 uppercase tracking-wider
classes.h3: text-2xl font-bold mb-3 text-yellow-400 uppercase tracking-wide
classes.th: border border-cyan-900 p-2 bg-cyan-900 font-bold text-cyan-300 uppercase text-sm
classes.blockquote: border-l-4 border-pink-500 pl-4 italic my-4 text-pink-200 bg-gray-900 py-2 rounded-r
classes.code: bg-gray-900 px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded font-mono text-sm text-green-400 border border-cyan-800
classes.pre: bg-gray-950 p-4 rounded overflow-x-auto border border-cyan-800
